programme.title: Y Pitws Bychain
programme.desc: Wrth i'r Pitws Bychain gerdded trwy'r goedwig, maen nhw'n darganfod dwmi babi. As the Wee Littles walk through the forest, they come across a misplaced baby's dummy and become intrigued.

programme.title: Chwedlau Tinga Tinga
programme.desc: Straeon lliwgar o Affrica am anifeiliaid y byd. Heddiw cawn glywed pam mae chwannen yn neidio. Today we find out why a flea jumps.

programme.title: Ahoi!
programme.desc: Ysgol Dyffryn y Glowyr sy'n ymuno â Ben Dant a Cadi i herio'r byd y tro 'ma. Ysgol Dyffryn y Glowyr joins Ben Dant and Cadi for a little adventure.

programme.title: Sion y Chef
programme.desc: Mae Siôn yn cytuno codi arian i warchodfa asynnod drwy redeg ras noddedig. A fydd cyngor Sid, sy'n rhedwr profiadol, yn ei helpu? Siôn agrees to take part in a sponsored run for donkeys.

programme.title: Ein Byd Bach...
programme.desc: Byddwn yn dysgu am awyrennau yn y bennod yma, a phwy wnaeth ddyfeisio ac adeiladu'r awyren gyntaf. We'll learn about Aeroplanes in this episode, and about who invented the first one.

programme.title: Caban Banana Gareth
programme.desc: Bydd Gareth yr Orangutan yn teithio ysgolion Cymru yn trafod amryw bynciau. Tro ma, Tyfy Fyny yw'r pwnc trafod. Today, Growing Up is the topic of discussion between Gareth and the schools.

programme.title: Blero'n Mynd i Ocido
programme.desc: Mae Blero a'i ffrindiau'n mynd ar antur i ddarganfod i ble mae holl ddwr Ocido yn mynd. Blero and his friends go on a white water adventure down the drain.

programme.title: Byd Tad-cu
programme.desc: Mae Ela'n holi 'Pam bod fy mol yn rymblan?', ac mae Tad-cu'n adrodd stori am bentre' Uwch Bentre' Bol Boliach. After Ela asks why does her stomach rumble? Tadcu tells another unusual story.

programme.title: Pablo
programme.desc: Mae gan Pablo ei ffordd ei hun o weld y byd, ond pan mae mam yn chwilio am rhywbeth, mae o'n poeni ac mae'n rhaid i bawb ei helpu i ffeindio 'dim byd'! Everyone helps Pablo find 'nothing'!

programme.title: Parc Glan Gwil
programme.desc: Mae Hywel Hwyl yn glanhau cartrefi'r anifeiliaid, ond mae'n cael damwain efo Madam Fflwffen y gwningen. Hywel Hwyl cleans the animals' homes but has an accident with Madam Flwffen the bunny.

programme.title: Byd Carlo Bach
programme.desc: Pwy sydd yn ran o gerddorfa Carlo? A pha synau rhyfedd maen nhw'n eu gwneud? Who is in Carlo's orchestra? And what strange sounds do they make?

programme.title: Sam Tan
programme.desc: Mae Pontypandy yn llawn cyffro pan ddaw tywysog brenhinol i ymweld. Pontypandy is abuzz with excitement when a royal prince comes to visit.

programme.title: Jambori
programme.desc: Ymunwch â Jam ar daith llawn synau, cerddoriaeth a lluniau lliwgar - gyda hwyaid yn dawnsio yn y bath, drws hudol yn y parc a chath yn coginio cacen. Welcome to a new series of Jamborî.

programme.title: Digbi Draig
programme.desc: Mae Glenys Gas yn syrthio i mewn i drap roedd hi'n ei wneud ar gyfer Digbi. Glenys Gas falls into a tricksy-trap she was making for Digbi and can't climb out.

programme.title: Jen a Jim a'r Cywiadur
programme.desc: Mae'n ben-blwydd ar Plwmp heddiw. Mae wedi derbyn anrheg anarferol, allwedd! It's Plwmp's birthday today. He has received an unusual gift, a key!

programme.title: Anifeiliaid Bach y Byd
programme.desc: Dewch i gwrdd ag anifeiliaid bach! Creaduriaid yr ardd sydd dan y chwyddwydr tro ma: y lindys a'r draenog. It's the garden animals under the spotlight this time - caterpillars & a hedgehog.

programme.title: Octonots
programme.desc: Pan fydd siarc rhesog yn llyncu camera sydd gan Ceri y crwban môr, ac yna yn bygwth Ceri ei hun, mae'n rhaid i Ira a'r Octonots ddod i'w hachub. A turtle needs rescuing from a tiger shark.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: Mae Odo yn dysgu i Dwdl ei bod hi'n dda dweud 'na' weithiau. Odo teaches Doodle that it can be good to say 'no' sometimes.

programme.title: Joni Jet
programme.desc: Mae hi'n Ddiwrnod Gwerthfawrogi'r Botiaid, ond mae Jetboi yn awyddus i gael y sylw i gyd! It's Bot Appreciation Day, but Jet-boy wants all the attention!

programme.title: Waw! - Grymoedd
programme.desc: Grymoedd yw'r thema y tro hwn! Ymunwch â Awi a chriw Waw i ddarganfod a mwynhau! Gravity is the theme this time! Join Awi and the 'Waw' crew to discover and enjoy!

programme.title: Sali Mali
programme.desc: Torra Jac Do ei galon wrth ddod o hyd i robot tegan, a gollodd amser maith yn ôl, mewn cyflwr truenus. Jaci Soch and Tomos Caradog have a plan to build a better robot toy for poor Jac Do.

programme.title: Twt
programme.desc: Mae'r cychod yn bwriadu cynnal regata ond mae'r gwynt yn gostegu. Sut mae creu awel tybed? The boats are planning a regatta when the wind suddenly drops. Can they create a breeze?

programme.title: Guto Gwningen
programme.desc: Mae Guto'n addo mwydod i'r Llyg i'w ddenu i barti pen-blwydd Nel Gynffonwen,ond mae'n rhoi pawb mewn perygl. Guto promises the Shrew some worms to entice him to Nel's birthday party.

programme.title: Pentre Papur Pop
programme.desc: Ar yr antur popwych heddiw mae Huwcyn yn cael bod yn Sheriff Pentref Papur Pop. On today's poptastic adventure, Huwcyn becomes Pop Paper City's cowboy sheriff.

programme.title: Help Llaw
programme.desc: Mae Harri yn cael galwad i ddweud bod cwch wedi torri yng Nglan Llyn. Yno hefyd mae Tomi wedi cicio pêl i'r llyn! Harri gets a call to say that a boat has broken down in Glan Llyn.

programme.title: Cywion Bach
programme.desc: Llew yw'r gair arbennig heddiw. Dere i chwarae, chwerthin a dysgu gair gwych gyda Bip Bip, Pi Po, Bop a Bw. Learn all about the word Llew (Lion) with Bip Bip, Pi Po, Bop and Bw.

programme.title: Joni Jet
programme.desc: Pan aiff Jet-fam i hedfan efo Jetboi, ceisia Joni wneud popeth y ffordd 'iawn', gan amau ei fod ar brawf. When Jet-mom goes to fly with Jet-boy, Joni tries to do it all the 'right' way.

programme.title: Jambori
programme.desc: Ymunwch â Jam ar daith llawn synau, cerddoriaeth a lluniau lliwgar - gyda hwyaid yn dawnsio yn y bath, drws hudol yn y parc a chath yn coginio cacen. Hi! Welcome to a new series of Jamborî!

programme.title: Tomos a'i Ffrindau
programme.desc: Mae Tomos yn cynnig helpu Gordon i wneud danfoniad pwysig, ond mae Gordon yn ansicr. Tomos offers to help Gordon make an important delivery, but Gordon is unsure.

programme.title: Kim a Cai a Cranc
programme.desc: Mae Kim a Cai yn cwrdd â Môr-lawes swil. Y Kim and Cai meet a shy Môr-lawes.

programme.title: Heno
programme.desc: Sgwrs gyda Gemma Pritchard ac ymgyrch codi ymwybyddiaeth o ganser y coluddyn. Tonight we encourage people to wear football shirts to raise awareness of bowel cancer.

programme.title: Pobol y Chwarel

programme.title: Cegin Bryn: Y Dosbarth Meistr

programme.title: Yr Whws
programme.desc: Mae'r Whws eisiau adeiladu ffae ond 'dyw'r deunydd maen nhw'n ei ddefnyddio ddim yn gweithio, felly mae'n cadw cwympo'n ddarnau. The Woohoos want to build a den - but then things go wrong!

programme.title: Kim a Cai a Cranc

programme.title: Blero'n Mynd i Ocido

programme.title: Help Llaw

programme.title: Siwrne Ni

programme.title: Yr Whws

programme.title: Awyr Iach

programme.title: Blwi

programme.title: Byd Tad-cu

programme.title: Mari, Hari a'r Byd Tanddwr

programme.title: Pentre Papur Pop
programme.desc: Ar yr antur popwych heddiw ma'r ffrindiau'n creu deinosor ar gyfer amgueddfa Pentre Papur Pop. On today's poptastic adventure the friends craft a dinosaur for the Pop Paper City museum.

programme.title: New: Help Llaw
programme.desc: Pan fo toiled yn torri yn nhy gwesty teulu Gia-Minh cyn i VIP pwysig gyrraedd, mae Harri'n mynd i helpu. A toilet breaks in Gia-Minh's family guesthouse before an important VIP arrives!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptop
programme.desc: Mae creigiau mawr yn rhwystro Ted, ond mae tarw dur Mojo yn achub y dydd! Big rocks block Ted's way, but Mojo's mighty dozer top can save the day!

programme.title: Parc Glan Gwil

programme.title: Dyffryn Mwmin

programme.title: Oi! Osgar
programme.desc: Mae Osgar yn dwyn ffôn o gartref y Triawd ac yn darganfod llawenydd dosbarthu bwyd. Osgar steals a phone from the Trio's home and discovers the joys of food delivery.

programme.title: Dreigiau: Gwarchodwyr Berc

programme.title: Pigo Dy Drwyn

programme.title: Ne-wff-ion
programme.desc: Yr wythnos hon - y diweddara am hanes Teigr sy wedi bod ar goll a hanes Ffosil Lili ar draeth Y Barri. Story of a Tiger that has been lost and the history of Fossil Lili on Barry beach. [SL]

programme.title: Garddio a Mwy

programme.title: Ffermio

programme.desc: Mae gan Pablo ei ffordd ei hun o weld y byd, ond pan mae mam yn chwilio am rhywbeth, mae o'n poeni ac mae'n rhaid i bawb ei helpu i ffeindio 'dim byd'! Everyone helps Pablo find 'nothing'!

programme.title: Parc Glan Gwil
programme.desc: Mae Hywel Hwyl yn glanhau cartrefi'r anifeiliaid, ond mae'n cael damwain efo Madam Fflwffen y gwningen. Hywel Hwyl cleans the animals' homes but has an accident with Madam Flwffen the bunny.

programme.title: Byd Carlo Bach
programme.desc: Pwy sydd yn ran o gerddorfa Carlo? A pha synau rhyfedd maen nhw'n eu gwneud? Who is in Carlo's orchestra? And what strange sounds do they make?

programme.title: Sam Tan
programme.desc: Mae Pontypandy yn llawn cyffro pan ddaw tywysog brenhinol i ymweld. Pontypandy is abuzz with excitement when a royal prince comes to visit.

programme.title: Jambori
programme.desc: Ymunwch â Jam ar daith llawn synau, cerddoriaeth a lluniau lliwgar - gyda hwyaid yn dawnsio yn y bath, drws hudol yn y parc a chath yn coginio cacen. Welcome to a new series of Jamborî.

programme.title: Digbi Draig
programme.desc: Mae Glenys Gas yn syrthio i mewn i drap roedd hi'n ei wneud ar gyfer Digbi. Glenys Gas falls into a tricksy-trap she was making for Digbi and can't climb out.

programme.title: Jen a Jim a'r Cywiadur
programme.desc: Mae'n ben-blwydd ar Plwmp heddiw. Mae wedi derbyn anrheg anarferol, allwedd! It's Plwmp's birthday today. He has received an unusual gift, a key!

programme.title: Anifeiliaid Bach y Byd
programme.desc: Dewch i gwrdd ag anifeiliaid bach! Creaduriaid yr ardd sydd dan y chwyddwydr tro ma: y lindys a'r draenog. It's the garden animals under the spotlight this time - caterpillars & a hedgehog.

programme.title: Octonots
programme.desc: Pan fydd siarc rhesog yn llyncu camera sydd gan Ceri y crwban môr, ac yna yn bygwth Ceri ei hun, mae'n rhaid i Ira a'r Octonots ddod i'w hachub. A turtle needs rescuing from a tiger shark.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: Mae Odo yn dysgu i Dwdl ei bod hi'n dda dweud 'na' weithiau. Odo teaches Doodle that it can be good to say 'no' sometimes.

programme.title: Joni Jet
programme.desc: Mae hi'n Ddiwrnod Gwerthfawrogi'r Botiaid, ond mae Jetboi yn awyddus i gael y sylw i gyd! It's Bot Appreciation Day, but Jet-boy wants all the attention!

programme.title: Waw! - Grymoedd
programme.desc: Grymoedd yw'r thema y tro hwn! Ymunwch â Awi a chriw Waw i ddarganfod a mwynhau! Gravity is the theme this time! Join Awi and the 'Waw' crew to discover and enjoy!

programme.title: Sali Mali
programme.desc: Torra Jac Do ei galon wrth ddod o hyd i robot tegan, a gollodd amser maith yn ôl, mewn cyflwr truenus. Jaci Soch and Tomos Caradog have a plan to build a better robot toy for poor Jac Do.

programme.title: Twt
programme.desc: Mae'r cychod yn bwriadu cynnal regata ond mae'r gwynt yn gostegu. Sut mae creu awel tybed? The boats are planning a regatta when the wind suddenly drops. Can they create a breeze?

programme.title: Guto Gwningen
programme.desc: Mae Guto'n addo mwydod i'r Llyg i'w ddenu i barti pen-blwydd Nel Gynffonwen,ond mae'n rhoi pawb mewn perygl. Guto promises the Shrew some worms to entice him to Nel's birthday party.

programme.title: Pentre Papur Pop

programme.title: Help Llaw

programme.title: Cywion Bach
programme.desc: Llew yw'r gair arbennig heddiw. Dere i chwarae, chwerthin a dysgu gair gwych gyda Bip Bip, Pi Po, Bop a Bw. Learn all about the word Llew (Lion) with Bip Bip, Pi Po, Bop and Bw.

programme.title: Joni Jet
programme.desc: Pan aiff Jet-fam i hedfan efo Jetboi, ceisia Joni wneud popeth y ffordd 'iawn', gan amau ei fod ar brawf. When Jet-mom goes to fly with Jet-boy, Joni tries to do it all the 'right' way.

programme.title: Jambori

programme.title: Egin Bach

programme.title: Yr Whws
programme.desc: Mae'r Whws eisiau adeiladu ffae ond 'dyw'r deunydd maen nhw'n ei ddefnyddio ddim yn gweithio, felly mae'n cadw cwympo'n ddarnau. The Woohoos want to build a den - but then things go wrong!

programme.title: Kim a Cai a Cranc
programme.desc: Wrth ddilyn y dolffiniaid, mae Kim a Cai yn syrthio o dan y dwr, ble maen nhw'n cwrdd â chreadur anferth - Morfil! While following the dolphins, Kim and Cai end up under the water.

programme.title: Blero'n Mynd i Ocido

programme.title: Help Llaw

programme.title: Siwrne Ni

programme.title: Yr Whws

programme.title: Blwi

programme.title: Pentre Papur Pop

programme.title: New: Help Llaw

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: The Skeleton Key: A woman discovers a nasty side to her husband's personality when he goes into hospital before a holiday. (S5, ep 18)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: A Passing Opportunity: Frank is struggling financially and will do anything for money. When he meets a rich and successful schoolmate, he realises it may even stretch to murder. (S6, ep 1)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: The Deadly: A plumber who blackmails housewives over false claims of having affairs meets one who has an idea about stopping him. (S3, ep 11)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Miss Paisley's Cat: An elderly woman's beloved alley cat is killed by the local bookie, sending her down a path of rage. (S3, ep 12)

programme.title: Discovering: Roy Scheider
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Hollywood actor, whose roles in Jaws, All That Jazz and The French Connection catapulted him to stardom. (S12, ep 7)

programme.title: Andre Rieu: King's Ball
programme.desc: King's Ball: André presents highlights of his concert for the inauguration of the new King and Queen of Holland, including a performance of Time To Say Goodbye. (5 of 10)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: The Memory Man: Commemorate the passing of the late Doctor Who actor Bernard Cribbins by revisiting an episode of the Tales of the Unexpected he stars in - The Memory Man. (S6, ep 2)

programme.title: Frank Capra's A Hole In The Head
programme.desc: Widower Tony is trying to keep a hotel afloat while raising his son. Forced to ask his brother for help, he'll only bail him out if he quits his lifestyle and marries a sensible woman.

programme.title: Discovering: Joseph Cotten
programme.desc: A glimpse into the life of the Hollywood star, who first gained fame for his roles in Citizen Kane, The Magnificent Ambersons and Journey into Fear. (S12, ep 8)

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year 2014
programme.desc: Gary Kemp, Daniela Nardini and Ashley Jensen: An incredibly close heat means there's a twist in store. With Frank Skinner and Joan Bakewell. (S2, ep 3)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Clerical Error: While winding up his late father's affairs, Paul finds a bill demanding over £1,000 for pornography. He's suspicious of the claim... for a very good reason. (S6, ep 4)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Heir Presumptuous: George is murdered, and one of his nephews is seen fleeing the scene. The problem is his nephews are identical twins. Sheriff Milt Singleton investigates. (S6, ep 5)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Night of the Execution: A struggling deputy DA who gets a murder conviction against a man for killing his wife is confronted by another who claims he committed the crime. (S3, ep 13)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: The Percentage: Eddie Slovak meets an old Army buddy named Pete who once saved his life, but Pete's wife Louise falls for Eddie and the two form a romantic bond. (S3, ep 14)

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: 1982 Revisited: Guy takes a trip back to 1982, when the US is set for a Second British Invasion. Features a rare Bryan Ferry interview and performances from Squeeze and XTC. (S4, ep 2)

programme.title: The Rocky Horror Picture Show: Strange Journey
programme.desc: A London theatre play evolves into a groundbreaking cult phenomenon, featuring iconic songs and performances that celebrate individuality. 2025.

programme.title: Midnight Movies: From The...
programme.desc: ...Margins To The Mainstream. This documentary explores how from 1970-1977, six low-budget films shown at midnight transformed the way we make and watch films.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival Highlights 2023
programme.desc: Highlights of Saturday's acts at the Isle of Wight Festival 2023, where the likes of Anne-Marie, N-Dubz and The Chemical Brothers put on an incredible show.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: Success: The success of their forerunners enables the likes of Shania Twain, Macy Gray and Sarah McLachlan - and later Taylor Swift and Billie Eilish - to break new ground. (4 of 4)

programme.title: Andre Rieu: King's Ball
programme.desc: King's Ball: André presents highlights of his concert for the inauguration of the new King and Queen of Holland, including a performance of Time To Say Goodbye. (5 of 10)

programme.title: Lang Lang: My Favourite Melodies
programme.desc: The world-renowned pianist goes on a personal journey through his most beloved melodies. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Bagpipes - A Celebration
programme.desc: Bagpipes: A Celebration showcases Scotland's iconic bagpipe music with stunning landscapes, top pipe bands, soloists, and rich musical history.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: The Absence of Emily: Norma owns a big house and lets her sister Emily and her husband live there. But when Emily disappears, Norma makes too much fuss... (S5, ep 14)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: In the Bag: Cara hires safecracker Sam to get back her confiscated jewels. But when she insists on joining him on the job, Sam could be making the biggest mistake of his career. (S5, ep 15)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: A Man with a Fortune: A rich and lonely American ventures to England in search of his long-lost family. But when he meets Jane and her flatmate Eva, things begin to go wrong. (S5, ep 16)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Who's Got the Lady?: When a piece of art is stolen, the gallery owner gets his girlfriend to make copies of it to sell. But did the work ever really leave the building? (S5, ep 17)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: The Skeleton Key: A woman discovers a nasty side to her husband's personality when he goes into hospital before a holiday. (S5, ep 18)

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: The Black Curtain: A mugging jogs the memory of an amnesiac, who remembers he is being sought for murder. (S1, ep 9)

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Day of Reckoning: After a couple's drunken argument in the middle of a yacht party takes a tragic turn, collective motives yield unexpected results. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Audrey Hepburn stars as a bored and sheltered princess on the escape from her guardians, subsequently falling in love with an American newsman in Rome. Romance. (1953)

programme.title: Discovering: Jane Fonda
programme.desc: Movie experts look back at the life and career of Jane Fonda, who won Oscars for her performances in both neo-noir crime-thriller Klute and wartime drama Coming Home. (S9, ep 2)

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.desc: New. Len Deighton to Mick Herron: This episode looks at recent intelligence history, from the defection of Oleg Gordievsky to the killing of Osama bin Laden. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Making A Maestro
programme.desc: Making a Maestro: Step onto the podium as young conductors face the London Symphony Orchestra in a high stakes battle to prove they can become a maestro. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: The Shadows Final Tour
programme.desc: Hank Marvin, Bruce Welch and Brian Bennett are reunited for The Shadows' final tour in 2004, treating crowds to a medley of their greatest hits, including Apache, Living Doll and FBI.

programme.title: How The Beatles Changed The World
programme.desc: The history of The Beatles and their influence on music, art, culture, fashion and politics. Features new interviews and archive footage of the Fab Four.

programme.title: Stuart Sutcliffe: The Lost Beatle

programme.desc: The Skeleton Key: A woman discovers a nasty side to her husband's personality when he goes into hospital before a holiday. (S5, ep 18)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: A Passing Opportunity: Frank is struggling financially and will do anything for money. When he meets a rich and successful schoolmate, he realises it may even stretch to murder. (S6, ep 1)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: The Deadly: A plumber who blackmails housewives over false claims of having affairs meets one who has an idea about stopping him. (S3, ep 11)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Miss Paisley's Cat: An elderly woman's beloved alley cat is killed by the local bookie, sending her down a path of rage. (S3, ep 12)

programme.title: Discovering: Roy Scheider
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Hollywood actor, whose roles in Jaws, All That Jazz and The French Connection catapulted him to stardom. (S12, ep 7)

programme.title: Andre Rieu: King's Ball
programme.desc: King's Ball: André presents highlights of his concert for the inauguration of the new King and Queen of Holland, including a performance of Time To Say Goodbye. (5 of 10)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: The Memory Man: Commemorate the passing of the late Doctor Who actor Bernard Cribbins by revisiting an episode of the Tales of the Unexpected he stars in - The Memory Man. (S6, ep 2)

programme.title: Frank Capra's A Hole In The Head
programme.desc: Widower Tony is trying to keep a hotel afloat while raising his son. Forced to ask his brother for help, he'll only bail him out if he quits his lifestyle and marries a sensible woman.

programme.title: Discovering: Joseph Cotten
programme.desc: A glimpse into the life of the Hollywood star, who first gained fame for his roles in Citizen Kane, The Magnificent Ambersons and Journey into Fear. (S12, ep 8)

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year 2014
programme.desc: Gary Kemp, Daniela Nardini and Ashley Jensen: An incredibly close heat means there's a twist in store. With Frank Skinner and Joan Bakewell. (S2, ep 3)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Clerical Error: While winding up his late father's affairs, Paul finds a bill demanding over £1,000 for pornography. He's suspicious of the claim... for a very good reason. (S6, ep 4)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Heir Presumptuous: George is murdered, and one of his nephews is seen fleeing the scene. The problem is his nephews are identical twins. Sheriff Milt Singleton investigates. (S6, ep 5)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Night of the Execution: A struggling deputy DA who gets a murder conviction against a man for killing his wife is confronted by another who claims he committed the crime. (S3, ep 13)

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: The Percentage: Eddie Slovak meets an old Army buddy named Pete who once saved his life, but Pete's wife Louise falls for Eddie and the two form a romantic bond. (S3, ep 14)

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: 1982 Revisited: Guy takes a trip back to 1982, when the US is set for a Second British Invasion. Features a rare Bryan Ferry interview and performances from Squeeze and XTC. (S4, ep 2)

programme.title: The Rocky Horror Picture Show: Strange Journey
programme.desc: A London theatre play evolves into a groundbreaking cult phenomenon, featuring iconic songs and performances that celebrate individuality. 2025.

programme.title: Midnight Movies: From The...
programme.desc: ...Margins To The Mainstream. This documentary explores how from 1970-1977, six low-budget films shown at midnight transformed the way we make and watch films.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival Highlights 2023
programme.desc: Highlights of Saturday's acts at the Isle of Wight Festival 2023, where the likes of Anne-Marie, N-Dubz and The Chemical Brothers put on an incredible show.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: Success: The success of their forerunners enables the likes of Shania Twain, Macy Gray and Sarah McLachlan - and later Taylor Swift and Billie Eilish - to break new ground. (4 of 4)

programme.title: Andre Rieu: King's Ball
programme.desc: King's Ball: André presents highlights of his concert for the inauguration of the new King and Queen of Holland, including a performance of Time To Say Goodbye. (5 of 10)

programme.title: Lang Lang: My Favourite Melodies
programme.desc: The world-renowned pianist goes on a personal journey through his most beloved melodies. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Bagpipes - A Celebration
programme.desc: Bagpipes: A Celebration showcases Scotland's iconic bagpipe music with stunning landscapes, top pipe bands, soloists, and rich musical history.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: The Absence of Emily: Norma owns a big house and lets her sister Emily and her husband live there. But when Emily disappears, Norma makes too much fuss... (S5, ep 14)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: In the Bag: Cara hires safecracker Sam to get back her confiscated jewels. But when she insists on joining him on the job, Sam could be making the biggest mistake of his career. (S5, ep 15)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: A Man with a Fortune: A rich and lonely American ventures to England in search of his long-lost family. But when he meets Jane and her flatmate Eva, things begin to go wrong. (S5, ep 16)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Who's Got the Lady?: When a piece of art is stolen, the gallery owner gets his girlfriend to make copies of it to sell. But did the work ever really leave the building? (S5, ep 17)

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: The Skeleton Key: A woman discovers a nasty side to her husband's personality when he goes into hospital before a holiday. (S5, ep 18)

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Day of Reckoning: After a couple's drunken argument in the middle of a yacht party takes a tragic turn, collective motives yield unexpected results. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Audrey Hepburn stars as a bored and sheltered princess on the escape from her guardians, subsequently falling in love with an American newsman in Rome. Romance. (1953)

programme.title: Discovering: Jane Fonda
programme.desc: Movie experts look back at the life and career of Jane Fonda, who won Oscars for her performances in both neo-noir crime-thriller Klute and wartime drama Coming Home. (S9, ep 2)

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.desc: New. Len Deighton to Mick Herron: This episode looks at recent intelligence history, from the defection of Oleg Gordievsky to the killing of Osama bin Laden. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Making A Maestro
programme.desc: Making a Maestro: Step onto the podium as young conductors face the London Symphony Orchestra in a high stakes battle to prove they can become a maestro. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: The Shadows Final Tour
programme.desc: Hank Marvin, Bruce Welch and Brian Bennett are reunited for The Shadows' final tour in 2004, treating crowds to a medley of their greatest hits, including Apache, Living Doll and FBI.

programme.title: How The Beatles Changed The World
programme.desc: The history of The Beatles and their influence on music, art, culture, fashion and politics. Features new interviews and archive footage of the Fab Four.

programme.title: Stuart Sutcliffe: The Lost Beatle
programme.desc: Documentary on the tragically short but inspirational life of Scottish painter Stuart Sutcliffe, the original bass guitarist of The Beatles. Features rare archive footage.
